mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ORG_COMPANY_MNECODE (ID, ROW_VERSION, LANGUAGE, MNE_CODE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_SHORT_NAME, CREATOR, MODIFIER, CREATE_STAFF_ID, MODIFY_STAFF_ID )
select #{item.id}, #{item.rowVersion}, #{item.language}, #{item.mneCode}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.companyShortName}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.createStaffId}, #{item.modifyStaffId} from dual
